product.description:
Good Man, Good Deeds, Good Rice. Harvested all year round from Northeast Thailand, the region’s climate and fertile fields make it an ideal place for rice planting. Our finest rice grains are produced from these fields using 
state-of-the-art factory equipment. All our rice grains are stored in Singapore’s first and only chilled warehouse. This preservation technique prevents the growth of rice weevils without any usage of chemical fumigation.

metaData.Key Information:
•Please note that the quality of vacuum-packed rice remains unaffected should the packaging not arrive fully vacuum-sealed.
• Stored in SG 1st chilled warehouse without added chemical fumigation\n
• Get the perfect balance with SongHe Noble Brown Rice.\n
• Featuring a blend of 50% red cargo rice and 50% jasmine brown rice, the Noble Brown Rice is our best-selling whole grain rice.
metaData.Storage Information: Store in a cool and dry place to keep fresh and away from contamination

metaData.Key Information: •Please note that the quality of vacuum-packed rice remains unaffected should the packaging not arrive fully vacuum-sealed.
metaData.Preparation: • Rinse the rice under cool water: This will rinse away most of the starch, which will prevent the grains from becoming sticky when cooked. Continue washing the rice until the water is clear.• Transfer the rice to the rice cooker. Make sure the rice are evenly spread out to ensure even cooking.• Add the correct amount of water: Increase the recommended amount of water by 50% when cooking brown rice as it is tougher than white rice, hence it needs to be cooked longer.• Let the rice rest for 10-15 minutes after it is cooked.
metaData.SAP Product Name: NATUREL ORGANIC 100% HOM MALI BROWN RICE 2KG
metaData.Storage Information: Store in a cool and dry place

offers.description: Buy 1 Golden Eagle Thai Brown Rice @ $1.38 Off

metaData.Key Information: Premium Wholegrain Thai Jasmine Brown Rice 80% mixed with Thai Red Cargo Rice 20%. Softer and Tastier with a healthier punch. No soaking of rice is required. Simply add 2 cups of water to 1 cup of rice and cook in rice cooker for consistency results. Fluff the rice when cooked and let it sit in the rice cooker for 20 minutes before serving.
metaData.Storage Information: Store in a cool dry area
